en: Why, thank you. It's all right. You've never been out of Boston?
Nope. If I asked you about art, you'd probably give me the skinny on every art book ever written.
ko: 예술에 대해 물어보면, 아마 모든 예술 서적에 대한 정보를 줄 거예요. 미켈란젤로.

en: Michelangelo. You know a lot about him.
ko: 그에 대해 많이 알고 있어요. 인생의 작품.

en: Life's work, political aspirations, him and the pope, sexual orientation, the whole works, right?
I'll bet you can't tell me what it smells like in the Sistine Chapel.
ko: 시스티나 성당에서 나는 냄새를 말할 수 없을 거예요.

en: You've never actually stood there and looked up at that beautiful ceiling?
ko: 그곳에 서서 아름다운 천장을 올려다본 적이 없어요?

en: I've seen that. If I ask you about women,
you'd probably give me a syllabus of your personal favorites.
ko: 여기에 대해 물어보면, 아마 개인적으로 좋아하는 목록을 줄 거예요.

en: You may have even been laid a few times.
But you can't tell me what it feels like to wake up next to a woman and feel truly happy.
ko: 하지만 여자를 옆에 두고 기분 좋게 일어나는 게 어떤 건지 말할 수는 없겠죠.
